title: MUTUAL AID - 211info
text: MUTUAL AID DIABETES MUTUAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with acquiring insulin or diabetes supplies (injection supplies, home glucose monitoring systems, etc.), obtaining or renewing prescriptions, accessing health insurance or resolving issues with health insurance companies, peer support, and navigating diabetes resources. May provide limited financial assistance with copays and telehealth appointments to obtain prescriptions. Also accepts donations of diabetic supplies by connecting people with extra supplies to those in need in their area. Website Eligibility: Individuals affected by diabetes Hours: Not applicable Email (646) 780-9571 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (646) 780-9571 call or text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Home Glucose Monitoring Systems Insulin Insulin Injection Supplies Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs * Diabetes Peer Mental Health Support Services * Diabetes Specialized Information and Referral * Diabetes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
